groupings.title: Entry
groupings.description: Front doors. Pick start-feature when you know what you're doing; start-discussion when you're still working it out.

groupings.title: Planning
groupings.description: Discussion-driven skills that produce ADRs, Gherkin specs, and (when the existing code lacks them) characterization tests, before code starts.

groupings.title: Reviewing
groupings.description: Read-only audit suite. review-change / review-pr are aggregators that drive the diff through the agent pipeline (slice → fan-out → merge → verify) and emit findings without writing. The specialists (review-code, review-feature, review-test, review-security, review-ux) emit findings the orchestrators aggregate; callable directly when only one slice of audit signal is wanted. review-spec is a corpus-checker for new specs/ADRs against the existing set. All emit findings in finding-format.md schema; never edit files.

groupings.title: Driving
groupings.description: Orchestrators that drive state forward. drive-plan composes planning + implementation + review for substantial changes; drive-change implements + reviews from conversation intent for quick changes; implement-change writes code from a formal spec.

groupings.title: Shipping
groupings.description: Open the PR, iterate it to merge-ready.

groupings.title: Cross-cutting
groupings.description: Ghost-write in Alex's voice for anything published under his name, including Claude's own conversational output.
